title: Secret of Universe
description: Adds content from the "Ben 10" animated series. New dimensions, structures, items, and, of course, the cosmic watch!
body:
AT THE MOMENT THE MOD IS IN DEVELOPMENT

 

Description:Dive into the world of Ben 10 with this immersive Minecraft addon! This mod is designed as an expansion for the Palladium mod 🐿️, introducing the iconic Omnitrix and alien technology to your survival adventures. While the mod is fully compatible with Tinkers' Construct and Create (offering unique crafting recipes), these mods are not required to enjoy the core features.

Features:

  • New Resources: Discover Meteorite and Cosmic Steel. Meteorite can be found scattered across the world as crashed meteor structures, waiting to be mined.
  • The Omnitrix: The heart of the mod is here! The mod currently includes 4 different Omnitrix variants. While their full functionality is coming soon.
  • Thematic Crafting: For players using Tinkers' Construct or Create, this addon introduces special crafting recipes that blend the Ben 10 universe with the mechanics of these engineering mods.

Requirements:

  • Palladium 🐿️ Mod (required)
  • Tinkers Construct (optional)
  • Create (optional)

Note: This is a work-in-progress addon. The current version focuses on resource gathering and item collection. Stay tuned for future updates where the Omnitrix will gain its powers and allow you to transform into aliens!
